titleStmt.title: SII 28.312: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 312. (A.R. No. 466 of 1913.)

summary.p: Brahmapurīśvara temple, east wall, left of entrance.

p.hi: Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1438, Īśvara, Tai 29, chaturddaśi, Monday, Pūśam, Āyush-yōgam = 1518 A.D., January 25 (The Śaka Year was 1439. The tithi was śu. 14).

summary.p: Some portions of the inscription have been erased. It records a royal grant of a village (Tiruvāḻi-maṅgalam ?) which included all types of land nañchey, puñchey, garden-land etc., to God Biramīśvaram-uḍaiya-tambirāṉār. While listing the exceptions from the grant, Śaṅgamāpuram is mentioned. Its significance is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[§ svasti] . śrīmanmahāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Ariyarāyavipāṭṭaṉ metiṉi micurakaṇṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarā
yar keṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ tulukkataḷataḷavipāṭaṉ tulukka mokā
ṉ taviḻtāṉ Emmaṇḍalamum koṇṭu Aruḷiya rācākkaḷ tampirāṉ pūrvva tekṣiṇa paccima Uttara catuccamuttirātipati śrī
virapiṟatāpa śrīkiṟuṣṇatevamakārāyaṉ piṟutivi rācciyam paṇṇi yaruḷāniṉṟa cakātam 143 10 8l me
l cellā niṉṟa yicura varuṣam taiy mātam 2 10 9tiyati pūca nakkiṣattiṟamum catuṟtteciyum Āyuṣam yokamum peṟṟa comavāra puṇ
ṇiya kālattil kiḻkaraippūṉ ṟṟa nā mārur veḷḷāḻaṉ kaṇṇikaḷil periya ceyta piḷ
ḷai ṇa caiyaṉ tiruvāḻi maṅkalattil nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa to
ṭṭam ṭa nāṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai melnokkiya maram ki ḷ nokkiya kiṇaṟum Eṟppeṟatum cātivari
kaḷattup payiruṇṭāṉatum tuṟaiyil tirvaiyum caṅkamāpuramum nañcalākaRead niṅkalākaEṟppeṟpaṭṭatum Uḷppaṭap piramīcuramuṭaiya tampirāṉārkku cayireṇṇi yoka datārāpūṟuvamākat taṉma cātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom yinta taṉmattai nītivātaiyiṉṟi naṭattiṉavaṉ
cīpātam Eṉtalaimele yintat taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ Eḻeccamaṟuvāṉ keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷ pañcamāpātakam paṇṇiṉa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ §
svadattādviguṇam
puṇyam paradattaānu pālanam . paradattā pahāreṇa svadattanniṣphalam bhavet .
Digital edition of SII 28.312 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
